programmes.show_description: Sci-fi action with Alexandra Paul, Zoe Barker and Nigel Barber. When a new, highly explosive energy source seeps into the Earth's crust, can its creator save humanity from being extinguished (2014)?

Steed is under house arrest on suspicion of leaking secrets from the Carmadoc research institute. Can Tara and her new, hapless partner unearth the real traitor and prove Steed's innocence?
Steed and Tara investigate the deaths of secret agents attached to Cypher HQ. Can The Avengers determine whether the case is linked to leaked Top Secret information?
Mistakes of an inexperienced eastern bank clerk who attempts to settle on a ramshackle ranch near the Cannon family threaten to wipe out the cattle industry of the territory.

Tara visits Steed who is incapacitated in hospital with a broken leg. Little does she know she has led an old nemesis to Steed who is eager to extract their vengeance on him.
Steed receives a jewelled dagger, known as the Falcon, whose power lies in the ability to lead its owner to a sought after black pearl. However, every previous owner has died prematurely.
